description_long: This object consists of two segments of a cucumber, both with a glossy, dark green skin and subtle yellowish patches. One segment is cut to reveal the pale, moist interior with visible seeds and a fibrous texture, while the other remains whole with a slightly rough stem end. The skin is dotted with small, faint spots and a few shallow surface imperfections, typical of a fresh cucumber. The cut surface displays a moist, almost translucent flesh with a cluster of seeds in the center. The overall shape is cylindrical, slightly tapered at the ends, and the surface appears firm but not hard. The cucumber's exterior is smooth and shiny, reflecting light in several areas.
description: A glossy, dark green cucumber cut into two segments, one showing the moist, seeded interior and the other whole with a slightly rough stem end.
description_view_0: Shows both cucumber segments, with the left piece cut open to reveal the pale, seeded interior and the right piece displaying the rounded, glossy exterior.
description_view_1: Displays the smooth, shiny green skin of both cucumber segments stacked, highlighting their cylindrical shape and subtle surface spots.
description_view_2: Focuses on the rounded, stem ends of both cucumber pieces, emphasizing the glossy, dark green skin and slight tapering.
description_view_3: Shows the opposite sides of the cucumber segments, with both pieces lying parallel and their smooth, green exteriors visible.
attribute_location: isolated in space with an undefined background
attribute_orientation: lying flat and parallel to the ground plane
attribute_visible_markings: small spots, subtle yellowish patches, and a rough stem end
